locations.sapkowski_manor: Sapkowski Manor – A modest estate where Andrzej Sapkowski resides, surrounded by old stories and forgotten tales.
locations.forest_clearing: Forest Clearing – A peaceful clearing in the woods where an old storyteller is said to live.

items.storyteller_journal: Storyteller Journal – A journal containing the pact between Sapkowski and the Guild.
items.golden_contract: Golden Contract – A contract signed by both parties, outlining their agreement over the stories.

characters.sapkowski: Andrzej Sapkowski – A renowned author who created the world of witchers and monsters.
characters.old_storyteller: Old Storyteller – An ancient figure who knows the truth behind the pact and the mountain's curse.

action_text.unlock-path: I unlock a new path from ${from} to ${to} with ${item}.
